name: Raising a F***ing Star
overview: Bravo's classic series Showbiz Moms & Dads is coming to E! with all-new bigger-than-life parents of budding stars. This time around, these talented kids are not just dancers, actors, models and musicians... but are social media influencers with new content platforms with millions of followers. And stage parents are more competitive than ever before!

trailers.title: Raising A F***ing Star OFFICIAL Trailer | E!
